_publications._publicationTitle: Notch signaling via Hey1 and Id2b regulates Müller glia's regenerative response to retinal injury.

_contextSnippet: resulted in a dramatic reduction in promoter activation by NICD when assayed in transfected HEK293 cells
details: Used for luciferase assays to test hey1 promoter activation by NICD, showing dramatic reduction when Rbpj binding sites were mutated
